description: New report delivered: TNF-Alpha Target Area — Market Access Landscape (March 10 edition)
UnitedHealthcare updated adalimumab biosimilar step therapy requirements — now requires Hadlima or Hyrimoz trial before Humira
Sarah asked 3 questions on the TNF-alpha report about biosimilar formulary positioning
Cigna expanded preferred biosimilar list for infliximab — added Avsola to preferred tier across commercial plans
Mike commissioned a custom report: Biosimilar Formulary Dynamics in Psoriasis — Top 10 Commercial Plans
Sandoz launched Hyrimoz (adalimumab biosimilar) high-concentration formulation — now available in citrate-free option
Custom report completed: Biosimilar Formulary Dynamics in Psoriasis — Top 10 Commercial Plans
James asked about etanercept biosimilar interchangeability status across state pharmacy boards
FDA accepted sBLA for Yusimry (adalimumab biosimilar) interchangeability designation — decision expected Q3 2026
Anthem/Elevance announced Q2 formulary update: biosimilar-first step therapy for all TNF-alpha indications
Sarah asked about Humira patient assistance program impact on biosimilar adoption rates
Report delivered: TNF-Alpha Target Area — Market Access Landscape (February 24 edition)
Humana added biosimilar preferred status for golimumab alternatives in Medicare Advantage plans
